release_notes: GHL tag refresh overwrites unsaved ComboBox selection with previously-saved tag
changelog: FIX: GHL tag refresh (contact and opportunity) overwrote any unsaved ComboBox selection with the previously-saved INI value -- all four refresh handlers (RefreshGHLTags, RefreshGHLTagsSilent, RefreshGHLOppTags, RefreshGHLOppTagsSilent) now read the live ComboBox value via GuiControlGet before rebuilding the list, so the user's current selection is preserved
